assertion.text: Tau burden correlates more tightly with the clinical course of Alzheimer's disease than amyloid burden does.

evidence_spans.text: Tau burden tends to track the clinical course of Alzheimer's more tightly than amyloid burden, making it a stronger correlate of actual functional decline.

confidence.basis: notes_compiler: candidate finding from researcher's notes

provenance.title: Tau pathology tracks cognitive decline more closely than amyloid.md
